fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that the base item or production BOM is assigned to.

fields.name: Version Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version code of the production BOM that the item or production BOM component is assigned to.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item to which the item or production BOM component is assigned.

fields.name: Quantity Needed
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item or the production BOM component that is needed for the assigned item.
